name: article_id
description: RotoWire numeric article ID extracted from <guid> (e.g. '531201') — primary deduplication key

name: game_date
description: Date the scraper ran (partition key); use to group items collected on the same day

name: headline
description: Full <title> text from the RSS item (e.g. 'Andrew Wiggins: To sign three-year extension')

name: player_name
description: Player name extracted from headline before the first colon (e.g. 'Andrew Wiggins'). NULL if title format is unexpected.

name: action_text
description: Action/event text extracted from headline after the first colon (e.g. 'To sign three-year extension'). NULL if title format is unexpected.

name: description
description: News blurb body from <description>, with RotoWire boilerplate footer stripped. Plain text, no HTML tags.

name: published_at
description: UTC timestamp parsed from RSS <pubDate> (RFC 2822 format with named timezone)

name: article_url
description: RotoWire player page URL from <link> (points to the player profile, not a standalone article page)

name: rotowire_player_id
description: RotoWire numeric player ID extracted from the URL path (e.g. '3571' from '.../andrew-wiggins-3571'). NULL if URL format is unexpected.

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this item was collected by the scraper

name: source_file_path
description: GCS path of the source JSON file written by the scraper
